title: Baby Animals Remastered
description: Changes the models and textures of Baby Animals
body:
![Baby Animals Logo](https://i.imgur.com/IXeGM4Z.png) --- Entity Model Features (EMF) & Entity Texture Features (ETF) (or Optifine) REQUIRED! Gives unique models and textures to baby mobs. No more giant heads!
Currently Completed Mobs - Pigs (+ Warm & Cold Variants) - Chickens (+ Warm & Cold Variants) - Cows (+ Warm & Cold Variants) - Mooshrooms - Sheep - Wolves (+ Tamed)
Credits All models & textures in this pack are original, but would not be possible these mods & resource packs: - Baby Chicken, Cow, Sheep, and Wolf designs may look familiar to old-school players familiar with the no longer maintained [Baby Animals Mod](https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/1272517-1-6-4-baby-animals-model-swapper-squickens-mob) by cocoavalley. - I could not have figured out the techniques used for Optifine baby models without [Better Vanilla Babies & Pixel Perfect Mobs](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/better-vanilla-babies-optifine-1-14-4/) from DraminOver.
[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/I3I410P9Q1) ![Images Line Break](https://i.imgur.com/4UV0z4K.png) ![Puppy in a Farm](https://i.imgur.com/12lgKeI.png) ![Piglets in a Pen](https://i.imgur.com/5EYCMpd.png) ![Chicks in a Coop](https://i.imgur.com/jg20h6B.png) ![Lambs in a Field](https://i.imgur.com/7vQTD1a.png) ![Calfs on a Farm](https://i.imgur.com/9kL0emP.png)
